label: Backstory category and slot
description: A backstory category name paired with a life stage slot. Used in MeditationFocusDef to match or exclude pawns based on whether their backstory in the given slot belongs to the named category.

categoryName.label: Category name
categoryName.description: Backstory category identifier (e.g. Tribal, AdultTribal, ChildTribal). Must match a value listed in BackstoryDef.spawnCategories -- not a def name, just a plain string tag.

slot.label: Slot
slot.description: Life stage slot to check against: Childhood or Adulthood.
